evidence.text: 32 possible therapeutic antibodies. This scale makes it impossible to test every possibility through traditional lab experiments alone. To navigate this complexity, Genentech's scientists must analyze massive amounts of scattered data, including 38 million biomedical publications in PubMed, public repositories like the Human Protein Atlas, and their internal repository of hundreds of millions of cells across hundreds of diseases. Scientists must not only identify promising drug targets but also validate biomarkers—biological indicators that help track disease progression and treatment effectiveness.
